name: Mermaid Mindmap — Systematic Review Methodology
input: Create a mindmap of Systematic Review methodology with these branches: 1) Research Question (PICO framework, inclusion criteria, exclusion criteria), 2) Search Strategy (databases, search terms, grey literature), 3) Study Selection (title screening, abstract screening, full-text review), 4) Data Extraction (standardized forms, quality assessment, risk of bias), 5) Synthesis (meta-analysis, narrative synthesis, subgroup analysis).
qualityCriteria: No placeholder or lorem ipsum content
napkinBenchmark: Multi-level mindmap with central topic and branching subtopics.

data.syntax:
mindmap
  root((Systematic Review))
    Research Question
      PICO Framework
      Inclusion Criteria
      Exclusion Criteria
    Search Strategy
      Databases
      Search Terms
      Grey Literature
    Study Selection
      Title Screening
      Abstract Screening
      Full-Text Review
    Data Extraction
      Standardized Forms
      Quality Assessment
      Risk of Bias
    Synthesis
      Meta-Analysis
      Narrative Synthesis
      Subgroup Analysis
data.caption: Systematic review methodology mindmap covering all key phases
